_comment: ComfyUI API-format workflow: SD1.5 text-to-image (NO init image, NO inpainting, NO ControlNet).
Used by PrewarmGenerator (ADR-0008) to produce synthetic Reference Crops at startup.
Prompt + per-gid stable seed are the only conditioning. No real-person pixel ever
enters this workflow's diffusion call. Result is face-validated by InsightFace; on
failure PrewarmGenerator retries with seed+1 up to 5 times.
checkpoints/Realistic_Vision_V6.0_NV_B1_fp16.safetensors  (non-inpainting variant — the inpainting variant produces washed-out skin in plain txt2img because its UNet expects a 9-channel latent)
Per-call fields patched by PrewarmGenerator: positive prompt (node 3), seed (node 9),

inputs.text: a person, photorealistic, centered portrait, face visible, looking at camera, warm skin tone, soft natural light, sharp focus
deformed, mutated, blurry, low quality, artifacts, watermark, text, hood up, face hidden, side profile, back view
